status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are not closed can be reopened.
status.name: Closed

fields.description:
The construction of the context is expensive, includes per-task trips to NameNode for obtaining the information about job.jar, job splits etc which is redundant across all tasks.

We should have a common job-level context and a task-specific context inheriting from the common job-level context.
fields.summary: MR AM slows down due to repeatedly constructing ContainerLaunchContext

comments.body:
A very raw patch that I was using during the performance testing.

Will clean it up and add tests if any possible.
Cleaned up patch. Possible to write some tests. Next iteration.

-1 overall.  Here are the results of testing the latest attachment 
  http://issues.apache.org/jira/secure/attachment/12508160/MAPREDUCE-3566-20111220.txt
  against trunk revision .

    +1 @author.  The patch does not contain any @author tags.

    -1 tests included.  The patch doesn't appear to include any new or modified tests.
                        Please justify why no new tests are needed for this patch.
                        Also please list what manual steps were performed to verify this patch.

    +1 javadoc.  The javadoc tool did not generate any warning messages.

    -1 javac.  The applied patch generated 2310 javac compiler warnings (more than the trunk's current 2308 warnings).

    +1 eclipse:eclipse.  The patch built with eclipse:eclipse.

    -1 findbugs.  The patch appears to introduce 1 new Findbugs (version 1.3.9) warnings.

    +1 release audit.  The applied patch does not increase the total number of release audit warnings.

    +1 core tests.  The patch passed unit tests in .

    +1 contrib tests.  The patch passed contrib unit tests.

Test results: https://builds.apache.org/job/PreCommit-MAPREDUCE-Build/1486//testReport/
Findbugs warnings: https://builds.apache.org/job/PreCommit-MAPREDUCE-Build/1486//artifact/trunk/hadoop-mapreduce-project/patchprocess/newPatchFindbugsWarningshadoop-mapreduce-client-app.html
Console output: https://builds.apache.org/job/PreCommit-MAPREDUCE-Build/1486//console

This message is automatically generated.

Looks good. 

Minor nit: we don't need 'getInitialClasspath' anymore since it can be called in line in createCommonCLC?

Fixed the minor nit and also rename 'createInitialCLC' to 'getLocalCLC'.

I'll test this on a secure cluster.

-1 overall.  Here are the results of testing the latest attachment 
  http://issues.apache.org/jira/secure/attachment/12509468/MAPREDUCE-3566.patch
  against trunk revision .

    +1 @author.  The patch does not contain any @author tags.

    +1 tests included.  The patch appears to include 9 new or modified tests.

    +1 javadoc.  The javadoc tool did not generate any warning messages.

    +1 javac.  The applied patch does not increase the total number of javac compiler warnings.
